TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Drew Barry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Drew Barry, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya 1991 kawas, Barrymore ru Leland Hayward's na laqi msqun la.suruw lga ini msqun la. 1992-1993 kawas, hiya ru Jamie Walters msqun la. 1994 kawas 3 byacing 20 ryax, Barrymore ru Jeremy msqun la. suruw sazing byacing lga,Barrymore kmal likong. 1994 kawas,hiya t'aring Eric Erlandson msqun ,suruw lga, MTV ru psibay squilq na msyaq maki 1999 kawas. 2000 kawas hiya ru Green msqun.suruw qutux kawas lga, msqun la. hiya msqun mhtuw Charlie's Angels ru Green's,Green's kmal likong maki 2002 kawas 12 byacing.2002 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax,wal likong la. 2002 kawas,Barrymore ru Fabrizio Moretti t'aring msqun maki lahuy na hngzyang qwas.2007 kawas 1 byacing masoq 感情. hiya ru Justin Long msqun,2008 kawas 7 byacing,hiya ini msqun la.suruw lga,hiya msqun loziy ru te sazing ini msqun la. 2011 kawas,Barrymore ru Will Kopelman msqun la.msyahaw qani kmal msqun la ru 2012 kawas 6 byacing 2 ryax,maki Montecito, California msqun la.hiya maki sazing kneril laqi nya,Olive htgan 2012 kawas, Frankie htgan 2014 kawas.2016 kawas 7 byacing 15 ryax, Barrymore kmal likong,2016 kawas 8 byacing 3 ryax,wal likong la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *rew βarrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *rew βarrj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ, βarrjmore ru lelan* ħajwar*ʔs~ɕ na laqi ms~ɕqun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa ini ms~ɕqun la. ****-**** kawas~ɕ, ħija ru *amie walters~ɕ ms~ɕqun la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, βarrjmore ru *eremj ms~ɕqun la. s~ɕuruw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa,βarrjmore kmal likoŋ. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija tʔariŋ eriʦ~ʨ erlan*s~ɕon ms~ɕqun ,s~ɕuruw lɣa, mt* ru ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq na ms~ɕjaq maki **** kawas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ru ɣreen ms~ɕqun.s~ɕuruw qutux kawas~ɕ lɣa, ms~ɕqun la. ħija ms~ɕqun mħtuw ʦ~ʨħarlieʔs~ɕ aŋels~ɕ ru ɣreenʔs~ɕ,ɣreenʔs~ɕ kmal likoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ.**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,wal likoŋ la. **** kawas~ɕ,βarrjmore ru *aβrizio moretti tʔariŋ ms~ɕqun maki laħuj na ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕoq **. ħija ru *us~ɕtin loŋ ms~ɕqun,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,ħija ini ms~ɕqun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ms~ɕqun lozij ru te s~ɕaziŋ ini ms~ɕqun la. **** kawas~ɕ,βarrjmore ru will kopelman ms~ɕqun la.ms~ɕjaħaw qani kmal ms~ɕqun la ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,maki monteʦ~ʨito, ʦ~ʨali*ornia ms~ɕqun la.ħija maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi nja,oli*e ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ, *rankie ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, βarrjmore kmal likoŋ,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,wal likoŋ la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Drew Barry sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1973, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 2, Drew Barry, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya 1991 kawas, Barrymore ru Leland Hayward's na laqi msqun la.suruw lga ini msqun la. 1992-1993 kawas, hiya ru Jamie Walters msqun la. 1994 kawas 3 byacing 20 ryax, Barrymore ru Jeremy msqun la. suruw sazing byacing lga,Barrymore kmal likong. 1994 kawas,hiya t'aring Eric Erlandson msqun ,suruw lga, MTV ru psibay squilq na msyaq maki 1999 kawas. 2000 kawas hiya ru Green msqun.suruw qutux kawas lga, msqun la. hiya msqun mhtuw Charlie's Angels ru Green's,Green's kmal likong maki 2002 kawas 12 byacing.2002 kawas 10 byacing 15 ryax,wal likong la. 2002 kawas,Barrymore ru Fabrizio Moretti t'aring msqun maki lahuy na hngzyang qwas.2007 kawas 1 byacing masoq 感情. hiya ru Justin Long msqun,2008 kawas 7 byacing,hiya ini msqun la.suruw lga,hiya msqun loziy ru te sazing ini msqun la. 2011 kawas,Barrymore ru Will Kopelman msqun la.msyahaw qani kmal msqun la ru 2012 kawas 6 byacing 2 ryax,maki Montecito, California msqun la.hiya maki sazing kneril laqi nya,Olive htgan 2012 kawas, Frankie htgan 2014 kawas.2016 kawas 7 byacing 15 ryax, Barrymore kmal likong,2016 kawas 8 byacing 3 ryax,wal likong la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *rew βarrj s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *rew βarrj, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja **** kawas~ɕ, βarrjmore ru lelan* ħajwar*ʔs~ɕ na laqi ms~ɕqun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa ini ms~ɕqun la. ****-**** kawas~ɕ, ħija ru *amie walters~ɕ ms~ɕqun la. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, βarrjmore ru *eremj ms~ɕqun la. s~ɕuruw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa,βarrjmore kmal likoŋ. **** kawas~ɕ,ħija tʔariŋ eriʦ~ʨ erlan*s~ɕon ms~ɕqun ,s~ɕuruw lɣa, mt* ru ps~ɕiβaj s~ɕquilq na ms~ɕjaq maki **** kawas~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ħija ru ɣreen ms~ɕqun.s~ɕuruw qutux kawas~ɕ lɣa, ms~ɕqun la. ħija ms~ɕqun mħtuw ʦ~ʨħarlieʔs~ɕ aŋels~ɕ ru ɣreenʔs~ɕ,ɣreenʔs~ɕ kmal likoŋ maki **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ.**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,wal likoŋ la. **** kawas~ɕ,βarrjmore ru *aβrizio moretti tʔariŋ ms~ɕqun maki laħuj na ħŋzjaŋ qwas~ɕ.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕoq **. ħija ru *us~ɕtin loŋ ms~ɕqun,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ,ħija ini ms~ɕqun la.s~ɕuruw lɣa,ħija ms~ɕqun lozij ru te s~ɕaziŋ ini ms~ɕqun la. **** kawas~ɕ,βarrjmore ru will kopelman ms~ɕqun la.ms~ɕjaħaw qani kmal ms~ɕqun la ru **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,maki monteʦ~ʨito, ʦ~ʨali*ornia ms~ɕqun la.ħija maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi nja,oli*e ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ, *rankie ħtɣan **** kawas~ɕ.**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax, βarrjmore kmal likoŋ,**** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax,wal likoŋ la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
